title: Teresa Bushman
compiled_truth: Teresa Bushman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-18), Teresa Bushman sent 45 and received 361 emails, totalling 406 interactions.
